literal_spec_infeasibility_argument: For an A=6 cubic continued fraction, |L_N - L_ref| ~ exp(-6 N log N). At N=1200, log10|L_N - L_ref| ~ -22150, so resolving y_N at N=1200 requires dps >= ~22150. The literal dps=8000 + N>=1200 reading cannot be honoured simultaneously without precision underflow. We honour the prompt's `dps>=8000` clause by setting dps=25000 (a safety buffer above the 22150-digit floor at N=1200) and run N up to 1200.

halt_info.reason: LIN/EXP 5-param ansatze disagree on A by 2.31741260807e-6 > 1e-30; finite-N bias is not eliminable at dps=8000.
